blurb: Zemfira, Brother 2, and школьная дискотека pop on one CD-R.
A diary, a cassette adapter, and t.A.T.u. absolutely everywhere.
Star Factory on TV, t.A.T.u. going global, and everyone arguing over lyrics.

blurb: Early Zveri guitars, Star Factory hooks, and the first real ringtone era.

blurb: Чёрный бумер on every Nokia. The двор had a soundtrack.

tracks.title: Не верь, не бойся, не проси

blurb: Районы, кварталы. A Walkman, a дача, and семки.
Билан almost won Eurovision. You knew every word.
Серебро, МакSим, and a Motorola RAZR.
